\[
t^2 = 1.19^2 = 1.4161
\]

\[
g = \frac{2(5.06)}{1.4161} = \frac{10.12}{1.4161} \approx 7.15
\]

So the gravitational constant is consistently about:

\[
g \approx 7.14
\]

\[
